stem: Each base of a right rectangular prism has a length of 15 inches and a width of 9 inches. The prism has a volume of 1,890 cubic inches. What is the height, in inches, of the prism?
rationale: Choice B is correct. The volume V of a rectangular prism is V = lwh. Substituting V = 1,890, l = 15, and w = 9 gives 1,890 = 135h. Dividing by 135 yields h = 14 inches.
